name: My Program
goal: Max Snatch + C&J · Squat + Deadlift Build

phases.title: MESOCYCLE 1 — STRENGTH BASE (CHINESE)
phases.subtitle: Weeks 1–4 · 6/8–7/3 · High Frequency / Daily Squat / Pull Strength

intent.title: Week 1 · 6/8–6/12
intent.text: Establish Chinese-style frequency. Squat every training day. Heavy pull volume to rebuild back strength at the top of the pull and turnover. Snatch and clean to power above knee to drill the second pull.

exercises.name: Snatch Pull (3s to knee, accelerate)
exercises.note: Supramaximal — builds back strength through full first-pull ROM. Different segment from the high pull below. · 1 set / 75s

exercises.name: Snatch High Pull from Power Position
exercises.note: Bar to sternum, elbows high and wide — NO catch. Trains upper back and trap engagement at the very top of the pull. Completely separate from a power snatch. · 1 set / 75s

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.note: Daily squat — base volume · 2 min rest

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — straight off the bar from your last working set · 90s rest after

exercises.name: Clean Pull (3s to knee, accelerate)
exercises.note: Supramaximal — first pull strength, same logic as snatch pull · 1 set / 75s

exercises.name: Push Press + Split Jerk
exercises.note: Jerk frequency — finish every C&J day with jerk work · 1 set / 75s

exercises.name: Power Clean + Push Jerk
exercises.note: Clean work on Wednesday — balancing the snatch overhead focus · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — strip the pause, keep the bar · immediately after pause sets

exercises.name: Bench Press — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — right off the bar, pump the chest · no rest from working sets

exercises.name: Snatch Pull from Blocks (below knee)
exercises.note: Snatch-specific second pull. Start position = shin vertical. Drive through the floor. · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Clean Deadlift
exercises.note: Deadlift build — strict back position · 1 set / 2 min

exercises.name: Jerk from Rack
exercises.note: Jerk frequency — reinforce receiving position · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Bent Over Row — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — lighter, faster, feel the lats · no rest from working sets

exercises.name: Good Morning
exercises.note: Posterior chain / top of pull · 75s rest

exercises.name: Clean & Jerk — Wave 5
exercises.note: 3 min rest · commit to the jerk

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — immediate, no pause, no rest between · burns out what the pause left

intent.title: Week 2 · 6/15–6/19
intent.text: Loading climbs. Pull percentages rise, squat volume holds. High pulls and Chinese pulls reinforce the top of the pull and turnover speed.

exercises.name: Snatch Pull (3s to knee, accelerate)
exercises.note: Supramaximal — builds back strength through full first-pull ROM. Different segment from the high pull below. · 1 set / 75s

exercises.name: Snatch High Pull from Power Position
exercises.note: Bar to sternum, elbows high and wide — NO catch. Trains upper back and trap engagement at the very top of the pull. Completely separate from a power snatch. · 1 set / 75s

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — no rest from last set · 90s after

exercises.name: Clean Pull (3s to knee, accelerate)
exercises.note: Supramaximal — first pull strength, same logic as snatch pull · 1 set / 75s

exercises.name: Power Clean + Push Jerk
exercises.note: Clean work on Wednesday — balancing the snatch overhead focus · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Bench Press — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — right off the bar, pump the chest · no rest from working sets

exercises.name: Clean & Jerk — Wave 5
exercises.note: 3 min rest · commit to the jerk

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — immediate, no pause, no rest between · burns out what the pause left

intent.title: Week 3 · 6/22–6/26
intent.text: Peak loading week of meso 1. Heaviest pulls and deadlifts of the block. Squat volume at its highest frequency. Top-end pull and acceleration work at peak intensity.

exercises.name: Snatch Pull (3s to knee, accelerate)
exercises.note: Supramaximal — builds back strength through full first-pull ROM. Different segment from the high pull below. · 1 set / 75s

exercises.name: Snatch High Pull from Power Position
exercises.note: Bar to sternum, elbows high and wide — NO catch. Trains upper back and trap engagement at the very top of the pull. Completely separate from a power snatch. · 1 set / 75s

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.note: Daily squat — peak volume · 2 min rest

exercises.name: Clean Pull (3s to knee, accelerate)
exercises.note: Supramaximal — first pull strength, same logic as snatch pull · 1 set / 75s

exercises.name: Push Press + Split Jerk
exercises.note: Peak jerk volume for meso 1 · 1 set / 75s

exercises.name: Power Clean + Push Jerk
exercises.note: Clean work on Wednesday — balancing the snatch overhead focus · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Bench Press — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — right off the bar, pump the chest · no rest from working sets

exercises.name: Snatch Pull from Blocks (below knee)
exercises.note: Peak load for the block. · 1 set / 2 min

exercises.name: Clean & Jerk — Wave 5
exercises.note: 3 min rest · commit to the jerk

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — immediate, no pause, no rest between · burns out what the pause left

intent.title: Week 4 · 6/29–7/3
intent.text: Deload / transition. Drop volume significantly. Maintain intensity on key lifts. Prep for meso 2 force-acceleration block.

phases.title: MESOCYCLE 2 — FORCE & ACCELERATION (CHINESE)
phases.subtitle: Weeks 5–8 · 7/6–7/31 · Pull Acceleration / Power Variations / Strength Build

intent.title: Week 5 · 7/6–7/10
intent.text: Acceleration block begins. Pulls from blocks/deficit to attack knee-to-extension. Heaving snatch balance and tall snatch hammer the lockout. Squat strength shifts toward heavy triples.

exercises.name: Deficit Snatch (1in)
exercises.note: Longer pull builds knee-to-extension drive · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Pause Power Snatch (3s at knee)
exercises.note: Catch in power position — own the receive, speed over depth the deficit built — own it · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.note: Heavy — no pause, straight strength · 2.5 min rest

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — long finisher, straight off the bar · 90s rest after

exercises.name: Block Clean (below knee) + Jerk
exercises.note: Drive from the block — attack the extension · 1 set / 2 min

exercises.name: Pause Power Clean (3s at knee)
exercises.note: Catch in power position — reinforce the high receive · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Split Jerk w/ 2s Pause in Dip
exercises.note: Pause jerk — own the dip, explode through · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Tall Snatch
exercises.note: Start standing, no leg drive — pure arm speed and turnover mechanics · 1 set / 60s

exercises.name: Heaving Snatch Balance
exercises.note: Aggressive overhead lockout — punch hard · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Snatch Push Press + 2 OHS
exercises.note: Lockout strength + overhead stability — deload off the snatch balance · 1 set / 75s

exercises.name: Power Clean + Push Jerk
exercises.note: Clean work on Wednesday — both lifts represented · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Bench Press — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET · no rest from working sets

exercises.name: Snatch Pull
exercises.note: Second pull acceleration — primes the lift below · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Clean Deadlift (3s pause at knee)
exercises.note: Hold the position — back strength at the top of the pull · 1 set / 2 min

exercises.name: Pendlay Row — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — switch to touch-and-go, chest to floor each rep · no rest

exercises.name: Clean & Jerk — Wave 5
exercises.note: 3 min rest · commit to the jerk

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — immediate, no rest between · burns out what the working sets left

intent.title: Week 6 · 7/13–7/17
intent.text: Intensity climbs. Pull loads creep up, squats move to heavy doubles. Lockout and acceleration variations push percentages.

exercises.name: Deficit Snatch (1in)
exercises.note: Longer pull builds knee-to-extension drive · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Pause Power Snatch (3s at knee)
exercises.note: Catch in power position — own the receive, speed over depth the deficit built — own it · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.note: Heavy — no pause, straight strength · 2.5 min rest

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — long finisher, straight off the bar · 90s rest after

exercises.name: Block Clean (below knee) + Jerk
exercises.note: Drive from the block — attack the extension · 1 set / 2 min

exercises.name: Pause Power Clean (3s at knee)
exercises.note: Catch in power position — reinforce the high receive · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Split Jerk w/ 2s Pause in Dip
exercises.note: Pause jerk — own the dip, explode through · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Tall Snatch
exercises.note: Start standing, no leg drive — pure arm speed and turnover mechanics · 1 set / 60s

exercises.name: Heaving Snatch Balance
exercises.note: Aggressive overhead lockout — punch hard · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Snatch Push Press + 2 OHS
exercises.note: Lockout strength + overhead stability — deload off the snatch balance · 1 set / 75s

exercises.name: Power Clean + Push Jerk
exercises.note: Clean work on Wednesday — both lifts represented · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Bench Press — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET · no rest from working sets

exercises.name: Clean Deadlift (3s pause at knee)
exercises.note: Hold the position — back strength at the top of the pull · 1 set / 2 min

exercises.name: Clean & Jerk — Wave 5
exercises.note: 3 min rest · commit to the jerk

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — immediate, no rest between · burns out what the working sets left

intent.title: Week 7 · 7/20–7/24
intent.text: Peak loading week of meso 2. Heaviest pulls and squat singles of the block. Acceleration and lockout work at peak intensity before the deload.

exercises.name: Deficit Snatch (1in)
exercises.note: Longer pull builds knee-to-extension drive · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Pause Power Snatch (3s at knee)
exercises.note: Catch in power position — own the receive, speed over depth the deficit built — own it · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.note: Heavy — no pause, peak of the block · 2.5 min rest

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — long finisher, straight off the bar · 90s rest after

exercises.name: Block Clean (below knee) + Jerk
exercises.note: Drive from the block — attack the extension · 1 set / 2 min

exercises.name: Pause Power Clean (3s at knee)
exercises.note: Catch in power position — reinforce the high receive · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Split Jerk w/ 2s Pause in Dip
exercises.note: Pause jerk — own the dip, explode through · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Tall Snatch
exercises.note: Start standing, no leg drive — pure arm speed and turnover mechanics · 1 set / 60s

exercises.name: Heaving Snatch Balance
exercises.note: Aggressive overhead lockout — punch hard · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Snatch Push Press + 2 OHS
exercises.note: Lockout strength + overhead stability — deload off the snatch balance · 1 set / 75s

exercises.name: Power Clean + Push Jerk
exercises.note: Clean work on Wednesday — both lifts represented · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Bench Press — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET · no rest from working sets

exercises.name: Snatch Pull
exercises.note: 1 set / 2 min — primes the lift below

exercises.name: Clean Deadlift (3s pause at knee)
exercises.note: Hold the position — back strength at the top of the pull · 1 set / 2 min

exercises.name: Clean & Jerk — Wave 5
exercises.note: 3 min rest · commit to the jerk

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — immediate, no rest between · burns out what the working sets left

intent.title: Week 8 · 7/27–7/31
intent.text: Deload / transition. Reduce volume, maintain intensity. Rest up before meso 3 wave loading and the peak begin.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.note: Heavy — no pause, deload volume · 2 min rest

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — straight off the bar · 90s rest after

exercises.name: Pause Power Clean (3s at knee)
exercises.note: Catch in power position — reinforce the high receive · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Split Jerk w/ 2s Pause in Dip
Tall Snatch
exercises.note: Start standing, no leg drive — pure arm speed and turnover mechanics · 1 set / 60s

phases.title: MESOCYCLE 3 — PEAK & TEST
phases.subtitle: Weeks 9–12 · 8/3–8/28 · Wave Loading / RM Squats & Deadlifts / Olympic Total

intent.title: Week 9 · 8/3–8/7
intent.text: Wave loading introduced on both snatch and C&J. RM squat and deadlift work begins on Friday. Competition lifts dominate Monday. Pull and lockout volume tapering.

exercises.name: Clean Deadlift — 3RM
exercises.note: Work up: 50%×3, 65%×2, 75%×1, 85%×1, then build to max · 3–5 min between top attempts

exercises.name: Back Squat — 3RM
exercises.note: Work up: 50%×3, 65%×2, 75%×1, 85%×1, then build to max · 3–5 min between top attempts

exercises.name: Jerk from Rack
exercises.note: Stay warm in the jerk before squat work · 1 set / 2.5 min

exercises.name: Clean & Jerk — Wave 5
exercises.note: 3 min rest · commit to the jerk

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — immediate, no pause, no rest between · burns out what the pause left

intent.title: Week 10 · 8/10–8/14
intent.text: Wave loading intensity climbs. 2RM squat and deadlift work. Competition lifts pushing toward 90%+.

exercises.name: Clean Deadlift — 2RM
exercises.note: Work up: 50%×3, 65%×2, 75%×1, 85%×1, then build to max · 3–5 min between top attempts

exercises.name: Back Squat — 2RM
exercises.note: Work up: 50%×3, 65%×2, 75%×1, 85%×1, then build to max · 3–5 min between top attempts

exercises.name: Clean & Jerk — Wave 5
exercises.note: 3 min rest · commit to the jerk

exercises.name: Back Squat — Drop Set
exercises.note: DROP SET — immediate, no pause, no rest between · burns out what the pause left

intent.title: Week 11 · 8/17–8/21
intent.text: Peak intensity. Heaviest wave loading of the cycle. 1RM squat and deadlift work. Competition lifts at near-max. Intensity builds through the week then drops sharply on Saturday for a confident dress rehearsal.

exercises.name: Clean Deadlift — 1RM
exercises.note: Work up: 50%×3, 65%×2, 75%×1, 85%×1, then build to max · 3–5 min between top attempts

exercises.name: Back Squat — 1RM
exercises.note: Work up: 50%×3, 65%×2, 75%×1, 85%×1, then build to max · 3–5 min between top attempts

exercises.name: Jerk from Rack
exercises.note: Near-max — stay sharp for test week · 1 set / 3 min

exercises.name: Snatch
exercises.note: Heavy enough to feel authoritative — fast, confident, not maximal · 1 set / 2.5 min

exercises.name: Clean & Jerk
exercises.note: Same — sharp singles, no grinders · 1 set / 2.5 min

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.note: Light — stay fresh for test week · 2.5 min rest

exercises.name: Hip Thrust
exercises.note: Dress rehearsal — keep posterior chain fresh · 75s rest

intent.title: Week 12 · 8/24–8/28 🏆
intent.text: Max out week. Mon/Tue/Wed = light opener feel + light accessory to stay sharp without accumulating fatigue. Fri/Sat = Olympic Total. New 1RMs on snatch, C&J, back squat, and deadlift.

exercises.name: Snatch (opener feel)
exercises.note: Easy. Fast. Confident. Nothing heavier. · 1 set / 2 min

exercises.name: Clean & Jerk (opener feel)
exercises.note: Same — sharp and done. · 1 set / 2 min

exercises.name: Jerk from Rack
exercises.note: Stay confident under the bar · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Power Snatch
exercises.note: Fast and technical. Last snatch before the total. · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Power Clean + Push Jerk
exercises.note: Light C&J work — stay sharp · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Snatch (opener feel)
exercises.note: Easy. Just feel the movement. · 1 set / 90s

exercises.name: Clean Deadlift — 1RM
exercises.note: Test the deadlift build · 3–5 min between attempts

exercises.name: Thoracic Mobility
exercises.note: T-spine rotations, foam roll thoracic · move through each rep

exercises.name: Hip 90/90 Mobility
exercises.note: Each side. Open the hips. · move through each rep

exercises.name: Snatch Balance (empty bar)
exercises.note: Reinforce the drop. Feel the overhead. · 1 set / 75s
